ideas.title: first video
ideas.notes: a first video about who I am and why they should follow me. So what does it look like you have so many goals but not bringing any of them into life. Welcome into my ADHD brain, ive been feeling like I'm not using my full potential, yes I did travel the world by myself, I randomly moved to dubai, it doesn't make up for all the things I want that I'm avoiding, such as posting this. I keep coming up with so many excuses by now is not the right time, I only should start a certain thing in my life happens, that's the truth is I don't think I'm ever gonna feel ready, so here is showing up anyways.
ideas.script: So what does it look like

ideas.title: Leven
ideas.notes: Life is only as hard as you make it and that is why

ideas.title: Take 1
ideas.hook: So yes i did lie, but hear me out
ideas.script: How do i admit that the reason why i havent started was not me be too busy. I cant convince myself that it was logical that i spend days making a content planner on claude with zero content to plan was rational. But i guess it kept me safe. Safe from being cringe, safe from posting and no one watching my videos. They were all excuses, because i realise being creative does not have to be perfect, it has to be fun and thru to yourself. So welcome to my first video

ideas.title: Take 2
ideas.script: The person who said I will start my own business one day. One day I will take that risk one day I start posting on social media. I’m just waiting for everything to be perfect. That person had to die and that person is me because the truth is, I don’t know when I will die and that one day might never comemoments time mught get the best of me. And I’m not gonna let that happen. So here’s my first reel and heres to quitting my job to start my own business with zero proof and just an idea

ideas.title: Take 3
ideas.hook: Im potentially about to ruin my life
ideas.script: But if i have to go to 0 to get to a 100 then i guess im willing to make that sacrifice. Well for tou to understand the full story, you have to know that I graduated law only two solo travel the world to then spontaneously decide to move to Dubai to work and I find outthat I love Dubai, but I don’t love what I do. Im about to make one of the hardest decisions ever, leaving Dubai to start my own company. Because I realized that I don’t think I’m gonna find any job that’s going to make me feel. Fulfilled.  I don’t know why but for the longest time I’ve been feeling this pull towards entrepreneurship.I’ve no clue or proof that it will work. It feels bittersweet on one hand. I’m excited to start something new but on the other hand, I’m sad too leave a place behind. Ralph tried so hard to build a life for myself here.But I will document a journey follow along.

ideas.title: Take 3
ideas.notes: It took me 10 years to build up the courage to start social mediaI was waiting for the perfect moments the perfect timing in my life the perfect the perfect circumstancesAll this planning took away from creating

series.name: leaving it all
series.desc: this serie is about leaving behind my life in dubai to go in to start my own business
